title: Month-End Close: Write Variance Commentary
description: Get AI-generated variance commentary that drills into the GL to find real drivers — not generic summaries.

steps.title: Create a 'Variance Commentary' skill
steps.content: This skill compares current month actuals to prior month and/or budget. It should drill into the GL detail to identify the specific transactions driving each significant variance, with quantified dollar amounts.

steps.title: Set materiality thresholds
steps.content: Tell Claude your materiality threshold (e.g., variances over $5,000 or 10% of the line item). Below-threshold variances get a one-liner; above-threshold get a full explanation with the top 3 drivers by dollar amount.

steps.title: Format for management review
steps.content: Output should be a clean table: line item, current month, prior month/budget, variance $, variance %, and commentary. Ready to drop into a management reporting package.
